0.model_generation:
Dear Emma,

I’m writing to thank you for the incredible kindness you showed when you surprised me with my favorite coffee and a heartfelt note last week. Your thoughtful gesture turned an ordinary morning into a moment I’ll always treasure. Seeing you go out of your way brought so much light and laughter to my day, reminding me how lucky I am to have you in my life.

Your generosity means the world to me, and our friendship is one of the greatest gifts I’ve ever received. I feel deeply supported and understood, especially when you listened to my concerns and offered words of encouragement. Your presence fills my heart with joy and has lifted my spirits in ways I can’t fully capture in words.

Thank you for being such an extraordinary friend. I look forward to many more shared moments and wish you endless happiness and love.

With warmest gratitude,

Sincerely,  
Anna

1.details:

show understanding of how your action affected the other person

1.model_generation:
I am writing to apologize for my failure to attend our scheduled meeting last Tuesday and for not letting you know in advance. I take full responsibility for my absence and the inconvenience it caused to your planning and schedule. I understand that my actions may have come across as disrespectful and unreliable, and I sincerely regret the stress it created. At the time, I misjudged the demands of another project and allowed poor time management to prevent me from reaching out to you. I own my lapse in judgment and recognize that I should have communicated clearly and in a timely manner. To make amends, I have rearranged my priorities to accommodate your needs and am ready to reschedule at your earliest convenience. Thank you for your patience and understanding. I value our collaboration and will ensure this does not happen again.

Sincerely,
1.final_version:

2.details:

show empathy and understanding

2.model_generation: Hey, I know you’ve been facing long days at work, overwhelming deadlines, and the stress of balancing so much on your plate. It takes a lot of energy and courage to keep pushing forward every day. I want you to know I see how hard this is for you, and I understand that sometimes it feels overwhelming and lonely. You don’t have to face it alone—I’m here for you, ready to listen or just sit quietly by your side. Your determination, kindness, and sense of humor shine even in tough times. You inspire me with your strength and warmth. Please remember to take care of yourself: get enough rest, take breaks, and do small things that bring you joy. I care about you more than words can say, and I believe in you always. Whenever you need a shoulder or a friend, I’m just a call or text away, and I’ll always cheer you on.

3.model_generation: From the moment our eyes met across the crowded college library, I felt a spark—your warmth and easy laughter drew me in. For the past five years, we’ve woven our lives together in countless small moments: sharing coffee at dawn, exploring mountain trails under starlit skies, and cheering each other on through every challenge. You inspire me with your unwavering kindness, boundless curiosity, and steadfast belief in who I can become. Because of you, I am braver, kinder, and more myself than I ever thought possible. Today, I promise to love you without reservation, to support your dreams as fiercely as you support mine, and to cultivate our joy in every ordinary day. I vow to listen, to laugh, to grow alongside you, and to build a life filled with adventure, compassion, and home. With all that I am, and all that I will be, I choose you—now and for all our tomorrows.

mention our friendship and shared experience

4.model_generation: I still remember the day we met at the university library, huddled over the same stack of psychology books. From that moment on, our friendship took off, fueled by late-night study sessions and our legendary caffeine-fueled debates. We survived our first road trip together—complete with a flat tire in the middle of nowhere and your heroic roadside pancake attempt that ended in syrupy disaster. You’ve always been the one to wear your heart on your sleeve, radiating kindness, humor, and unwavering loyalty. Watching you conquer every challenge—from finishing your master’s degree to launching your dream job—has been nothing short of inspiring. Our secret code word “pineapple” still cracks us up, reminding me how effortlessly we share laughter and trust. Today, I celebrate not only your incredible achievements but the amazing person you’ve become. Thank you for being my rock, my partner in crime, and my greatest joy. I love you more every day.
4.final_version:
happy birthday to my incredible friend and amazing person . I have known vee for 8 years, and every moment we have shared has ben filled with laughter, adventure and growth. from our late night conversations to our spontaneous road trips, i have seen vee shine in so many ways. who would miss the times were we where the only ones who understood the inside jokes. vee brings so much joy and positivity to everyone around her. her sense of humor is infectious and her kindness is inspiring. I have seen how how she have impacted the lives of those around her, including mine. As vee celebrates another year of life, i want to say thank you for being  such an amazing friend. your strength, resilience an heart are qualities that i admire. keep shining your light and make the world a brighter place.

Here to many more adventures, laughter, and memories together .cheers to vee on her special day!

5.details:

mention how long it has been
share news about your job
mention new hobbies
mention shared moments and experience

5.model_generation:
Hey there, I hope this letter finds you well! I’m so excited to reconnect after nearly three years since we last caught up. A lot has happened on my end: I recently accepted a position as a marketing manager at a tech startup, and I’ve been immersing myself in new challenges every day.

Outside of work, I’ve discovered a passion for rock climbing and watercolor painting—I never imagined I’d spend weekends scaling walls or mixing pigments. I often think about our road trip to the lake and those late-night study sessions; those memories still bring a smile.

How have you been? What adventures or projects have you been diving into lately? I’d love to hear all about your life and plans. Let’s schedule a video call or grab coffee in the coming weeks—I’m free most weekends. Can’t wait to catch up properly and hear your news!
5.final_version:
hey thato
it has been ages since we last spoke, and i have been thinking about you nonstop lately. life has been crazy, but in a good way. I just wanted to reach out and catch up on everything that has been going on in your world. i have got some exciting news to share, i have recently started a new job, and it has been a great challenge so far. i have been learning so much and meeting amazing people. it is funny, though, because some of the experiences i have ever had reminded me of you and the good times we shared. do you remember the time we got lost because we were too interested weird things while the group we went on the beach trip went a different route from ours, i laugh out load every time i think of that day. i often think about our conversations and the advices you gave me . your insight and perspective have stuck with me . let's catch up and make new memories
